channel.title: Github-Api on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Github-Api on Arrans github.io

item.title: blackwell-systems/shelfctl
item.description: PDF/EPUB library CLI/TUI backed by GitHub Release assets (Git LFS alternative). On-demand per-file downloads, metadata catalog, migrate/split bloated repos.

item.title: lowlighter/metrics
item.description: 📊 An infographics generator with 30+ plugins and 300+ options to display stats about your GitHub account and render them as SVG, Markdown, PDF or JSON!

item.title: arran4/gobookmarks
item.description: Landing page for when you open browsers / live bookmarks in go.
